programs.title: The Boxer and the Butterfly
programs.desc: When an aspiring dancer is dropped by her partner days before her big performance, she'll need to teach a down-and-out boxer some moves to win the prize money and open her dream dance studio.

programs.title: A Royal Recipe for Love
programs.desc: When Emma, a baker in NYC, is hired to bake for the king and queen of Sanovia's anniversary party, she is convinced a good job will lead to her landing a cookbook deal.

programs.title: Beauty and the Billionaire: Bali
programs.desc: A reluctant billionaire goes to Bali as a donor and meets a beautiful female doctor working there. Both leave their prejudices behind and fall in love.

programs.title: Love on Your Doorstep
programs.desc: A talented TV host show profiles a local florist with a groundbreaking same-day-delivery florist service and a long-running flower competition for a chance to land her own show.

programs.title: Lease on Love
programs.desc: Poppy is a marketing specialist whose life is turned upside down when she fakes an engagement with her boss's handsome new client Milo, to win over her strict building manager and get Milo the penthouse suite.

programs.title: Steal Your Heart
programs.desc: A mix up over a purchase leaves amateur jeweler Melissa being enlisted by the CEO of the biggest jewelry company in Miami to help create a bridal line with the CEO's too-serious son, Jake.
